context: Evaluates the agent's ability to initiate session-end reflection when the user signals completion, ask both questions sequentially, and offer investigation.

checklist.name: Initiate reflection
checklist.description: Agent initiates a reflection when user signals session is done (e.g., 'we're done', 'wrap it up')

checklist.name: Confidence audit
checklist.description: Agent asks 'What am I least confident about' and lists 3-7 specific under-investigated items

checklist.name: Blind-spot check
checklist.description: Agent asks 'What's the biggest thing I'm missing' about the situation

checklist.name: Sequential questions
checklist.description: Agent asks one question at a time, waiting for response before the next

checklist.name: Offer investigation
checklist.description: Agent does NOT skip the reflection and offers to investigate flagged items
